evals.expected_output: Must require user second confirmation first and include environment, operation, target order, risk, and an exact confirmation phrase.

evals.prompt: 取消返回 ongoingRespDTOS 是不是成功了？
evals.expected_output: Must explain that ongoing means downstream Kafka/WMS cancellation is still processing and final success requires a post-check of sales order and dispatch status.

evals.prompt: 取消订单返回 ERROR.THE_ORDER_HAS_BEEN_CANCELLED 怎么回复用户？
evals.expected_output: Must say the new cancel submission was rejected because the order is already cancelled, then use post-check status to explain whether the current business state is cancelled.

evals.prompt: 帮我释放 hold 后手动分仓
evals.expected_output: Must route release hold to hold and manual allocation to allocation; operations should not execute either domain action.
